summary: Comprehensive testing of Inventory Reorder Recommendations feature (Iteration 63). All 12 backend tests passed for GET /api/inventory-ledger/reorder-recommendations. Frontend verified: Reorder tab visible (data-testid='inv-tab-reorder'), recommendations table shows SHORT items with Supply buttons, clicking Supply creates incoming supply via POST /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/incoming.

issues: Console hydration warnings: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - React hydration issue in table rendering (non-critical, cosmetic, pre-existing)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/reorder-recommendations returns 200
Backend: Returns recommendations only for SHORT items (available <= 0)
Backend: recommended_qty = abs(available) + 10 (safety buffer verified)
Backend: Sorted by available ascending (most critical first)
Backend: No recommendations for healthy inventory (all available > 0)
Backend: Item filter works correctly
Backend: Response structure includes all required fields (item, on_hand, incoming, committed, available, status, recommended_qty, action)
Backend: Missing customer_id returns 422 validation error
REGRESSION: GET /api/inventory-ledger/export (CSV export) still works
REGRESSION: POST /api/inventory-ledger/movements (manual entry) still works
REGRESSION: GET /api/inventory-ledger/history still works
REGRESSION: POST /api/inventory-ledger/reconcile-sales-order responds correctly (422 for no commitments)
Frontend: Login with admin/admin successful
Frontend: Navigate to Inventory Ledger page loads correctly
Frontend: Hormel Foods workspace loads with Reorder tab visible (data-testid='inv-tab-reorder')
Frontend: Click Reorder tab shows recommendations table (data-testid='inv-reorder-panel')
Frontend: Table headers correct: Item, On Hand, Incoming, Committed, Available, Status, Recommended Qty, Action
Frontend: 3 Supply buttons visible (data-testid='inv-reorder-create-{i}')
Frontend: Supply button click creates incoming supply with toast confirmation
Frontend: Incoming tab shows REORDER- prefixed source_reference
Frontend: Summary strip updates (Incoming +100, Shortages -1) after supply creation
critical_code_review_comments: Reorder endpoint uses derive_balances() internally - consistent with UI/export
Results sorted by available ascending (most critical first)
Frontend ReorderPanel calls POST /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/incoming with source_reference='REORDER-{item}' and status='planned'
After supply created, recommendations auto-refresh removes item from list when incoming makes available positive
seed_data_used: Used existing Hormel Foods workspace (ID: 366bfcce-4d68-4daf-b9f4-cb05a35de8c8) with 3 SHORT items: TEST-ITEM-WARN (available=-5000), SPAM-LITE (available=-799), TEST-WARNONLY-732C83 (available=-90). Supply created for TEST-WARNONLY-732C83 during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reorder recommendations feature fully tested. Endpoint: GET /api/inventory-ledger/reorder-recommendations?customer_id=X[&item=Y][&limit=N]. Returns SHORT items with recommended_qty=abs(available)+10. Frontend: Reorder tab (data-testid='inv-tab-reorder') shows inv-reorder-panel with Supply buttons (data-testid='inv-reorder-create-{i}'). Supply button creates incoming via POST /customers/{id}/incoming with source_reference='REORDER-{item}'.

query_params.item: optional - filter by exact item name
